title: Chezeatter5000's random modpack
description: Chezeatter5000's random modpack adds storms/tornados/hurricanes, terrain mods, seasons, thirst, a tornado intercept mod, shaders, and other mods im too lazy to add
body:
Chezeatter5000's random modpack includes storm/tornado/hurricane (protomanly's weather and some more mods that is for protomanly.), terrain mods, thirst, minimap, tornado intercepter
mod, a new enchantment (its only just veinminer 😭), and food-related HUD improvments. (totally didnt steal that from appleskin description.) btw trying to make a superflat wont work due to the terrain mods so uhh ye
